cells.value: Reconciliation checks - the Phase-2 gate (all OK + Figures 0 FAIL)
POP stream partition OK (every in-scope action is BC)
Confirmation coverage of the in-scope corpus = 100%
Modeled bucket shares (7 + residual) sum to 100%
Sum of bucketed TAM = portfolio TAM (residual explicit)
Broad-component SAM <= TAM (SAM is a subset of TAM)
Broad SAM = TAM - unbucketed residual (all-buckets identity)
MYP correction is real (disclosed outside-yards > corrected)
GFE / Navy-directed scope dropped from the corpus (> 0)
Figures (Number_Audit): every deck figure ties to its source (0 FAILs)
Portfolio TAM = BC stream + AP/LLTM stream (two-stream sum)
AP/LLTM stream TAM <= in-window CY AP (share x coeff <= 1, no inflation)
Deck figure vs source cell - each deck value must equal its producer
Coefficient ladder - BC supplier coeff vs all-gated outside-yards POP
other-US + foreign over non-GFE BC corpus incl. masters
all-gated, masters excluded - DO NOT HEADLINE
MYP swing (the headline lever) - editable on Inputs
how much of the corpus the reconstruction carries
TAM sensitivity - MYP adjustment effect on TAM (corrected vs disclosed-only coeff)
BC base x MYP-corrected BC coeff (masters folded in)
what TAM would read if the $14.58B masters were NOT reconstructed
the masters' supplier-POP slice the reconstruction adds back to TAM
FFATA subawards ~15% of true yard-side flow
AP/LLTM stream (Phase 3) - editable knobs + BC/AP split
supplier POP share assumption (EOQ = vendor material); editable
CY AP x share x coeff
how much of the headline TAM is the AP/LLTM stream

Excluded PIIDs by class (FPDS obligated $M = size indicator, not subaward $)
IVECO - Marine Corps Mk110 gun (not DDG)  (1)
MARCORSYSCOM Mk110 gun (IVECO) - Marine Corps, not DDG
DDG-1000 / Zumwalt - out of class (LI 2119, closed)  (6)
DDG-1002 MSE - DDG-1000 out of class
DDG-1000 opt year 4 - out of class
DDG-1002 Zumwalt CSA - out of class
DDG-1000 systems engineering - out of class
DDG-1000 Zumwalt BYMP - out of class
WPN/OPN weapons - ESSM + CIWS, different appropriation (double-counts)  (9)
ESSM Block 2 EMD - WPN/OPN weapon (also the Thales $4.2B artifact PIID)
CIWS Mk15 Phalanx U&C - WPN/OPN weapon
ESSM CY26-30 design agent - WPN/OPN weapon
Risk-weighted confirmation - POP is a proxy; high-risk rows get manual confirmation
Tier 1 - top-$ actions covering ~90-95% of the weighted pool; all $250M+ / $100M+
Tier 2 - the two MYP masters (redacted; reconstructed from FPDS + trade press); all AP/EOQ
Tier 3 - POP not summing ~100% (high unparsed); GFE-suspect; any coefficient-mover
Confirmed = gated AND in-scope (non-GFE) AND manual_review_status<>unresolved (default 1)
